narrative: Hormuz Strait hostilities and Australian inflation risks drive a defensive shift as the Euro slips and USD/JPY firms to 159.29; gold lower -0.35%; equities +0.61%; DXY -0.08%; VIX 17.0. AUD/NZD bilateral divergence (+0.94% spread) dominates G8 flows ahead of the RBA's 4.35% vs RBNZ's 2.25% policy test. USD/CHF at 0.7859 reflects a 375bp carry advantage, though options markets show extreme hedging demand with a +18.8pt VRP. Watch RBNZ Rate Decision at 02:00 UTC.
